title: meliosma simplicifolia subsp. pungens
intro: Meliosma simplicifolia subsp. pungens is a plant species that belongs to the family Alangiaceae, commonly known as the meliosma tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Meliosma simplicifolia subsp. pungens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
